description_long: This is a single black leather Chelsea boot with a rounded toe and a low heel, featuring prominent red elastic side panels for easy slip-on access. The boot has visible red stitching along the seams, adding a contrasting accent to the otherwise dark exterior. The top of the boot includes two pull tabs, one at the front and one at the back, both of which appear to be made of woven fabric for durability and ease of use. The interior lining is a lighter tan color, likely made of a softer material for comfort. The sole is flat and appears to be made of rubber, providing traction and support for urban walking. The overall appearance suggests a sturdy, practical shoe suitable for everyday use in city environments.
description: A black leather Chelsea boot with red elastic side panels, red stitching, and pull tabs at the front and back. The boot has a flat rubber sole and a tan interior lining.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black leather exterior, red elastic panel, red stitching, and the rear pull tab.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back pull tab and the heel area, with the boot's opening partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other red elastic panel, red stitching, and the front pull tab.
description_view_3: Front view showing the rounded toe, front pull tab, and the boot's opening.
